title: rubus pubescens var. vulgaris
intro: Rubus pubescens var. vulgaris, also known as the American raspberry or wild raspberry, is a deciduous shrub native to eastern North America. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, with its leaves and roots containing anthocyanins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus pubescens var. vulgaris include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the management of diabetes, as well as its potential to act as a natural remedy for digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions made from its leaves and roots, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
